title: 2018 Census regional tour | Stats NZ
content:
## 2018 Census regional tour
Information to help you find and use regional data from the 2018 Census.
Many of the 2018 Census seminars planned for March and April 2020 were cancelled because of COVID-19 restrictions. In place of the seminars, we've developed a video tutorial and presentation slides to help professional and community-based users find and use census data.
Stats NZ tutorial on tools to access 2018 Census data
Find out about results from the 2018 Census – what's happening at a regional level, what we know about our population and how it's changing, and how to access this information on our website.
These slides do not include information on ethnic and iwi profiles as they are not yet available. We will be developing a plan with iwi for which census products and information are most important for them, and how they will be disseminated.
This information is targeted at professional and community-based users who have some understanding of data use and the value of census data.
- Provides a broad overview of the census.
- Talks about the quality of 2018 Census data and changes from previous census datasets.
- Explains what information is available from the 2018 Census.
- Provides an update on progress of the next census.
